no: SoD Dialog Banters AstroBryGuy's original: banters The Gate Project fork: Changes Siege of Dragonspear dialog to use the standard ‘pause when talking’ format. NOT EET COMPATIBLE. Use SoD Banter Restoration (i=673) instead for EET installs.
sum: This mod changes the Siege of Dragonspear NPC banter dialogues from the "on-the-run" style used in SoD to the pausing dialogue format used in BG1 and BG2.

co.no: EET-only mod. SKIP expected on BG2EE pre-EET.
